page_content:
ANSC214 Applied Animal Physiology Laboratory (1 Credit)

Application of physiological laboratory techniques to domestic and lab animals.

Prerequisite: Must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in ANSC212.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

ANSC220 Livestock Management (3 Credits)

Management of meat animals including beef, sheep, and swine. This course will emphasize obtaining optimal efficiency of production through the integration of leading edge breeding, feeding, management, and marketing practices.
